failures.description: The ProductCatalogSearch dependency timed out, preventing the agent from retrieving the catalog evidence needed to answer whether the item has RAM=8GB.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The agent had the correct goal and followed the required plan: it decomposed the task, prepared the ProductCatalogSearch call with the provided item_id and product_id, and invoked the tool. At index 3, the tool returned an explicit infrastructure/connectivity-style error: CatalogServiceTimeoutError with message 'catalog search dependency timed out after 30000ms'. The invocation arguments were well-formed, and there is no evidence of schema validation failure, guardrail block, or misinterpretation. The error was not resolved later; subsequent steps only reported that the task could not be completed because tool evidence was unavailable.
